Title: Title
Description: Description

Title: Spelling Mistake on Registration Page
Summary: Minor spelling mistake in user registration form
Description: There is a minor spelling mistake in the title of the user registration page. It says 'Regestration' instead of 'Registration'.

Title: Footer Logo Pixelated
Summary: Company logo appears pixelated in email footer
Description: The company logo in the email footer appears slightly pixelated on high-resolution screens and needs a higher resolution asset.

Title: Grammar Error in Welcome Message
Summary: Welcome message has a minor grammar typo
Description: Grammar error found in the welcome message: it says 'your' instead of 'you are' when a user signs in.

Title: Login Button Mobile Layout Overlap
Summary: Login button overlaps text box on smaller screens
Description: The login button slightly overlaps with the password text box when viewed on mobile screens, making it look cramped.

Title: Dark Mode Switch Hitch
Summary: Dark mode graphic does not change state properly
Description: The dark mode toggle switch icon stays stuck on the moon graphic even when light mode is activated, though colors change.

Title: Navigation Menu Z-Index Issue
Summary: Navigation menu hides behind video element
Description: The main navigation menu temporarily hides behind the video player element when scrolling down the homepage.

Title: Dashboard Layout Misalignment
Summary: The table columns are misaligned on tablet views
Description: The table columns on the analytics dashboard are slightly misaligned on iPad devices, causing horizontal text overflowing past the borders of the container box.

Title: Missing Button Hover Effect
Summary: Profile picture upload button is missing its animation
Description: The profile picture upload widget is missing its hover animation effect. The cursor changes but the button layout doesn't shade dynamically.

Title: Critical Login Crash
Summary: Application freezes and crashes on login attempt
Description: The application crashes unexpectedly right after entering credentials on the login screen, triggering an infinite loading loop.

Title: Payment Gateway Blocked
Summary: Payment gateway completely unavailable during checkout
Description: Users are completely unable to complete purchases. The payment checkout container times out immediately and throws a critical system failure error.

Title: Title
Description: Description

Title: Scenario 1: Critical Blocker
Description: The application completely freezes and crashes unexpectedly right after launching the splash screen on iOS and Android devices.

Title: Scenario 2: Major Failure
Summary: Core search functionality is completely broken
Description: The main search bar filters return a 404 page and the form submit button is missing when trying to look up system records.

Title: Scenario 3: Minor Layout Bug
Summary: Dashboard layout alignment and overlapping text
Description: The table columns on the main dashboard layout have a severe misalignment issue where text elements are overlapping on tablet screens.

Title: Scenario 4: Trivial Cosmetic
Summary: Spelling mistake and typo on login banner
Description: There is a minor spelling mistake and typo in the welcome text header. The word receipt is misspelled on the user banner.
